title: Recruitment Coordinator (1 Year Contract)
description:
• Open to fresh graduates and experienced candidates to join the team.
  • Great exposure in a well-known investment bank.

About Our Client

A leading global financial institution, this firm provides investment banking, securities, asset management, and other financial services.

Job Description

  • Manage the hiring pipeline by scheduling interviews, coordinating interviewer rosters, and ensuring a smooth candidate experience.
  • Conduct pre-employment checks and facilitate offer and onboarding processes with accuracy.
  • Communicate effectively with candidates, recruiters, hiring managers, interviewers, and HR partners.
  • Follow standard operating procedures, maintain organization, and ensure seamless execution of recruitment tasks.
  • Handle multiple job openings and candidates simultaneously while maintaining attention to detail.
  • Act as a proactive and professional liaison across various teams within the division.

The Successful Applicant

  • Has a Degree in Business or relevant experience in Financial services firms
  • Strong business accumens, excellent relationship management and stakeholder engagement.
  • Highly organized with strong accuracy in task execution.
  • Quick learner, able to adjust to new procedures and changes.
  • Ability to handle multiple tasks efficiently and track progress.
  • Proficient in MS Office (Word, PowerPoint and Excel) and Zoom.

What's on Offer

This role offers hands-on experience in HR within the financial services industry, providing opportunities for professional growth, stakeholder collaboration, technical skill development, and career advancement.

Contact

Nicole Chan (Lic No: R2198620 / EA no: 18C9065)

postedCompany.description:
Page Personnel, an entity of Michael Page,   provides specialised recruitment services for professionals, along with highly specialised technical positions. We specialise in roles across industries, within the following functional disciplines in Singapore: 

  • Banking and Financial Services
  • Construction
  • Digital
  • Engineering and Manufacturing
  • Executive Search
  • Finance and Accounting
  • Healthcare
  • Human Resources
  • IT
  • Legal
  • Marketing
  • Procurement & Supply Chain
  • Property
